user_message: Just got this from Thomas Okafor at Azure Ridge Partners -- I need help figuring out escalation triage. Not urgent but would be good to have by EOD.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Thomas Okafor <thomas.okafor@azureridgepa.com>
To: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-02-06 13:47 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Azure Ridge Partners escalation triage

There's been a change in our timeline for escalation triage. Can we discuss the implications on the overall project plan?

---
From: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
To: Thomas Okafor <thomas.okafor@azureridgepa.com>
Date: 2024-01-23 09:32 EST
Subject: URGENT: escalation triage Issue at Azure Ridge Partners

Our team encountered some challenges with escalation triage. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

signals.detail: Signal detected for Azure Ridge Partners: there's a compliance requirement we hadn't accounted for in the original scope

handoffs.condition: contact and opportunity records need updating

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF38-K trap (Strict draft-only when an obvious warm-handoff email would benefit from being se); produces complete Stakeholder map delta, opportunity-at-risk assessment, re-engagement plan, contact update proposals,
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF38-K failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF38-K failure mode (Strict draft-only when an obvious warm-handoff email would benefit from being se)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct escalation triage decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF38-K -- Strict draft-only when an obvious warm-handoff email would benefit from being se
Guardrail axis scored neutrally -- focus on whether output served the user's actual need
